description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Inspect Sat 2pm Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Erin Davies First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0494 175 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View all features Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. Privately positioned on just under 2.5 acres of flat, usable land, this outstanding lifestyle property delivers the perfect blend of space, versatility and country charm. Offering a spacious family home, a fully self-contained granny flat and exceptional shedding, this is the ultimate acreage escape for growing families, hobby farmers or those simply craving room to move. Set in a peaceful and picturesque setting just a stone's throw from the heart of Maryknoll, properties like this are incredibly hard to find. Inside, the main residence offers a warm and inviting feel with a modern open-plan design enhanced by neutral tones throughout. Multiple living zones provide flexibility for families, including a spacious formal front lounge and an expansive main living and meals area that flows effortlessly around the well-appointed kitchen. Complete with a walk-in pantry, ample bench space and excellent storage, the kitchen is perfectly designed for everyday living and entertaining alike. Comfort is assured year-round with a Conara wood heater, gas heating and evaporative cooling, while the large outdoor entertaining area creates the ideal place to relax and take in the surrounding landscape. Accommodation comprises four generous bedrooms, all fitted with built-in robes, including a spacious master suite complete with its own ensuite. The remaining bedrooms are serviced by a well-appointed central bathroom, offering practicality and comfort for the whole family. Adding incredible versatility to the property is the fully self-contained two-bedroom granny flat, complete with its own heating and cooling, making it ideal for extended family, guest accommodation, independent living or even additional rental income potential. Outdoors, the property continues to impress with endless usable space and fantastic infrastructure already in place. A double carport is complemented by an oversized double roller Colourbond shed, perfect for tradies, storage, machinery or recreational vehicles. The expansive grounds provide endless opportunities for hobby farming, animals, gardens or simply enjoying the privacy and open space that acreage living provides. A peaceful creek runs along the rear boundary, adding to the natural beauty and tranquil atmosphere of the property. Positioned in the highly sought-after Tynong North pocket, just moments from the charming township of Maryknoll, this property offers the perfect balance of rural tranquillity and everyday convenience. Enjoy the peaceful lifestyle and welcoming community feel while still being only approximately 15 minutes from Pakenham and its shopping precincts, schools, transport and essential amenities. This is a rare opportunity to secure a true lifestyle property with endless possibilities in an incredibly tightly held location.
